title: rubus corylifolius var. laschii
intro: Rubus corylifolius var. laschii, also known as Himalayan Raspberry or Indian Raspberry, is a plant species belonging to the rose family (Rosaceae). It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, such as aiding in digestion, reducing fever, and supporting immune function. Rubus corylifolius var. laschii can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
